name: 3Blue1Brown
oneLine: Visual mathematics explainer channel built on Grant Sanderson's custom Python animation library, Manim.
bio: Grant Sanderson, a Stanford math graduate and former Khan Academy contributor, launched 3Blue1Brown in 2015 to teach higher mathematics from a visual perspective. He built the Python animation engine Manim specifically to produce the channel's precise, programmatic visuals, and the tool now has a thriving community fork. Series cover linear algebra, calculus, neural networks, differential equations, and probability with strong emphasis on intuition and discovery.
style: Manim-animated visual proofs and intuition-first lecture series, calm narration, no on-camera presence
